---
#[Sephy's Lab Notebook]{.shimmer-text}
---

# Welcome! 

I am happy to have you here!

This is where I document my path toward computational
biology and bioinformatics: pipelines I'm building, things I'm
learning, and the process behind the research (not the findings
themselves).

## Start here

- **[Lab Notebook](posts.qmd)** — dated entries on what I'm working
  through, week to week
- **[Reading Room](reading.qmd)** — recent articles I read and my notes on them in relations to my work I am currently doing.
- **[Pipeline Hub](pipelines.qmd)** — access to my pipelines!
- **[About](about.qmd)** — background, skills, and email contact if you need to contact me for any questions etc! 


# **Currently building:**

- a molecular docking pipeline for a TrkB/BDNF
research project.
(This pipeline does something genuinely [magical]{.shimmer-text}.)

- working through RNA-seq and variant-calling
fundamentals.

# **Built in dark-mode available via toggle next to the main logo**
